affiliation.zh: 华中科技大学 环境科学与工程学院
affiliation.en: School of Environmental Science and Engineering, Huazhong University of Science and Technology

eyebrow.zh: 能源 · 环境 · 人工智能

headline.zh: 能源与环境可持续发展

summary.zh: 面向低碳转型，我的研究关注能源系统优化、环境数据智能分析与可信人工智能方法，旨在为低碳城市、清洁能源和可持续发展提供可信的数据基础与评估方法。
summary.en: Towards a low-carbon transition, my research focuses on energy system optimization, intelligent analysis of environmental data, and credible artificial intelligence methods, aiming to provide a reliable data foundation and assessment methods for low-carbon cities, clean energy, and sustainable development.

bio.zh: 我长期关注能源、环境与人工智能交叉领域的问题。研究工作以真实系统中的数据、机理和决策约束为出发点，探索能够服务低碳转型和环境治理的智能方法。当前研究包括能源基础设施数据挖掘、可再生资源评估与不确定性分析、能源系统的环境影响等。欢迎具有能源工程、环境科学、数据科学、人工智能等背景的老师、同学交流。
bio.en: My research focuses on the intersection of energy, environment, and artificial intelligence. It begins with data, mechanisms, and decision constraints within real-world systems, exploring intelligent methods to support low-carbon transition and environmental governance. Current research includes energy infrastructure data mining, renewable resource assessment and uncertainty analysis, and the environmental impact of energy systems. I welcome faculty and students with backgrounds in energy engineering, environmental science, data science, and artificial intelligence to engage in discussions.
